name: agents-tester
description: Cross-platform tester agents (author/runner/coverage-judge) with a deterministic run+coverage toolkit for pi, Claude Code, and opencode.

scripts.check: node --check bin/run-tests.mjs && node --check bin/coverage-gate.mjs && node --check bin/generate-agents.mjs && node bin/generate-agents.mjs --check && node --test && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
